metro_lines.name: Blue Line (Line 1)
metro_lines.data_source: CMRL ridership data 2023-24; Blue Line fully operational since 2019

metro_lines.name: Green Line (Line 2)
metro_lines.corridor: CMBT (Chennai Mofussil Bus Terminus) - St Thomas Mount
metro_lines.data_source: CMRL ridership data 2023-24; lower ridership than Blue Line due to shorter corridor

lines.name: Beach - Tambaram Line
lines.data_source: Southern Railway Chennai Division ridership data 2023-24

lines.name: Chennai Central - Arakkonam Line
lines.data_source: Southern Railway Chennai Division ridership data 2023-24

suburban_rail.data_source: Combined suburban rail ridership for Chennai Division; MRTS (Mass Rapid Transit System) included in Beach-Tambaram corridor

bus_network.data_source: MTC annual report 2023-24; MTC operates approx 3800 buses, highest route count among the 6 cities reflecting Chennai's bus-dominant transit model

transport_network.total_daily_pt_ridership_data_source: Sum of metro (0.13M) + suburban rail (0.93M) + bus (4.8M); Chennai is the most bus-dependent major metro in India

economic_baseline.data_source: Median income estimated from NSSO PLFS 2022-23 Chennai urban MPCE scaled to household level; Gini from consumption expenditure distribution (lower inequality than Mumbai/Delhi); formal employment from EPFO data; sectors from Tamil Nadu Economic Survey 2023-24 (Chennai called 'Detroit of India' for automobile sector)

validation_anchors_note: To be populated post-Chennai calibration; potential anchors include CMRL Phase 1 ridership growth and MTC fare restructuring impact
